Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes to perform SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-AE Assign Reviewers following SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Declined measured as the duration until a new reviewer is successfully assigned (i.e., until SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Average time it takes for the process to recover from SW-Reviewer Declined by reaching SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the subsequent SW-Reviewer Unavailable in the same reviewer assignment cycle
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to Assign a Different Editor when editor reassignment occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Reviewer Declined considering only variants that include multiple reviewer declines before acceptance
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late in high-complexity variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Average time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Unassign Reviewer when explicitly logged
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-Reviewer Declined to the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, or SW-EIC Major Revision) grouped by variant type
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time it takes to transition from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Agreed compared to the average time from SW-Reviewer Unavailable to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where at least three reviewer declines occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time between consecutive occurrences of SW-Reviewer Declined within the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to the next Manuscript Export Succeeded when resubmission follows a major revision loop
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'
